description: Shared schema for ADDIN DOCSTYLE field codes. Used by both Lua (render) and R (harvest). v3: Anchor positioning.

anchor_payload_fields.class: CSS class name; determines positioning via anchor_styles in page-config.json
anchor_payload_fields.content_hint: Advisory content type: table | image | text | mixed
anchor_payload_fields.vertical_anchor: Vertical anchor: text | margin | page | section
anchor_payload_fields.position_y: Vertical offset from anchor (CSS length or dxa)
anchor_payload_fields.position_x: Horizontal offset from anchor (CSS length or dxa)
anchor_payload_fields.float_width: Width of anchored element (CSS length or dxa)
anchor_payload_fields.wrap_style: Wrap type: none | square | tight | top-and-bottom
anchor_payload_fields.wrap_side: Wrap side: both | left | right | largest
anchor_payload_fields.wrap_distance: Wrap spacing: 1-4 value CSS shorthand (top right bottom left)
anchor_payload_fields.z_layer: Layer: front | behind (maps to behindDoc on wp:anchor)
anchor_payload_fields.caption_y: Vertical offset of caption within group coordinate space (DXA)
anchor_payload_fields.image_height: Height of image member within group (DXA)

figure_payload_fields.docpr_id: Word wp:docPr/@id integer; stable identity anchor
figure_payload_fields.wrap: Text wrap: none | left | right; optional
figure_payload_fields.original_path: Source image path at render time; restored on re-harvest
